product_vision.name: Griptix
product_vision.description: Custom-crafted, Olympic-grade ergonomic grips for competitive sport shooting firearms (10m, 25m, 50m pistols/rifles).
product_vision.usp: Olympic-grade grips engineered from 5-year-aged climate-resistant walnut and carbon composites, offering perfect barrel axis alignment and guaranteed ISSF compliance.

core_pillars.title: Ergonomic Fit
core_pillars.description: Anatomically modeled to reduce wrist strain and maximize shot stability.

core_pillars.title: Premium Materials
core_pillars.description: 5-year-aged walnut and carbon fiber composite structures preventing warp.

core_pillars.title: ISSF Compliant
core_pillars.description: Guaranteed dimensional compliance matching international regulation boxes.

business_goals.primary: Digital flagship presence and e-commerce customization of grips globally.

conversion_funnels.d2c: Homepage -> Discipline Selection -> PDP configuration -> Sizing Wizard -> Add to Cart -> Checkout
conversion_funnels.b2b: Homepage -> Partner Program Landing -> Application Submit -> CRM Lead Follow-up
